MINI MINUTES:
No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF SAN FRANCISCO TIFFANY GARDENS HOMEOWNERS' (Re-noticed) Motion For Judgment On The Pleadings will be heard in Department 501, Housing Court, on the same day and time. Judge: Ernest Goldsmith; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Not Reported.

Plaintiff'S Judgment On The Pleadings
Off Calendar Nov-01-2012 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances - Atty. Anna P. Fabiano of Berding & Weil LLP (925-838-2090) appearing for plaintiff San Francisco Tiffany Gardens Homeowers Asso. moving party.
Defendant Joseph Aponte present (415-577-7382)

Argued, tentative ruling adopted as follows: Plaintiff'S Judgment On The Pleadings is Denied, defendant's general denial is sufficient where complaint doesn't allege any probative facts as to plaintiff's title other than general allegation of ownership. Morel v. Morel 203CA 417 South Shoreland v. Peterson 226 CA2 725. Order signed in open court. Judge Ronald E. Quidachay, Clerk K. Liu, not reported. (501/REQ)
